formulas.name: Molecular Weight of Polymer
formulas.variables: M: Molecular weight of the polymer, n: Number of monomer units, Mw: Molecular weight of the monomer

formulas.name: Degree of Polymerization
formulas.variables: n: Degree of polymerization, N: Number of polymer molecules, A: Number of monomer units

formulas.name: Number Average Molecular Weight
formulas.variables: Mn: Number average molecular weight, wi: Weight fraction of each polymer, Mi: Molecular weight of each polymer

formulas.name: Weight Average Molecular Weight
formulas.variables: Mw: Weight average molecular weight, wi: Weight fraction of each polymer, Mi: Molecular weight of each polymer

formulas.name: Polydispersity Index
formulas.variables: PDI: Polydispersity index, Mw: Weight average molecular weight, Mn: Number average molecular weight
